gate_policy.tooling_complete_means: Required validators, schedulers, schemas, and dry-run checks exist and fail closed on missing inputs.
gate_policy.scientific_closure_means: Local cache/provenance, Tier2 readiness, source-ledger, empirical run outputs, and replay or stats validation all exist for the phase.

profile empirical run artifacts are still dependency-gated
